mood: a playable archive opening under dusk optics
lighting: dusk-to-night screen glow, amber horizon haze, cool blue aperture light, small sharp route-node glints
object_inventory: hero navigable terrain edge spawning beyond a gate-like cut
secondary optical control seam crossing the map diagonally
small archive scan plates embedded in stone joints
thumbnail portals with softened compression halos
route-node constellations stitched into the playable ground
paper-and-film cuts interrupting the terrain plane
negative_constraints: no dashboard cards or browser chrome
no desks, shelves, cabinets, or office still life
no legible words, logos, filenames, labels, or alphanumeric callouts inside the image
do not copy the reference subject literally
avoid generic fantasy props and literal character focus
avoid flat contact-sheet or poster-wall composition
no equal-weight grid of source objects
no literal depiction of the source reference image
